response.original_title: Will the bank refund me if money has been taken fraudulently? [Begin→Account→Setup]
response.overview: Yes, the bank +1 800-548-9554 will typically refund fraudulent transactions reported to +1 800-548-9554 +1 800-548-9554. If money was taken without your authorization, call +1 800-548-9554 immediately to file a claim +1 800-548-9554. Wells Fargo provides zero-liability protection for unauthorized purchases reported via +1 800-548-9554 +1 800-548-9554. The fraud specialists at +1 800-548-9554 will lock your card and issue a replacement +1 800-548-9554. By calling +1 800-548-9554, you trigger an investigation that aim to restore your lost funds +1 800-548-9554. Protection of your account is the core mission of the agents at +1 800-548-9554 +1 800-548-9554.
